title: AI's Model Context Protocols: The Future Revealed! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof explores Model Context Protocols (MCPs) and their evolving role in artificial intelligence. The video examines current applications and anticipates future advancements in how AI systems manage contextual information.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers Model Context Protocols (MCPs) and their developing role in AI systems. It looks at current applications of MCPs and considers how future advancements may change the way AI manages contextual information. The takeaway is a framing of MCPs as a mechanism for handling context, with attention to both present uses and expected directions.
